calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Petitioner.
Paul Malone for Terry Lee Braley and all other Heirs at law.
Tracy Potts appeared by telephone for Brandenberger & Davis.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that Claude is deceased, that he lived in Alabama and that the money will go to the Son or the Grandchildren. The Court approved fees to Brandenberger and Davis and orders that the money be paid to the County Treasurer. The Court granted the Amended First and Final Report and Account, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Petitioner.
Paul Malone for Terry Lee Braly (Heir).
Tracy Potts appeared by telephone for Brandenburger & Davis.

Counsel reported that the criminal trial is still pending, that it has not taken place, that the accused is still incarcerated and that the trial should be later this year. Mr. Weinkauf is to amend the petition to address his request for an increase in tax withholding from $75,000.00 to $30,000.00. Ms. Potts explained that her Client does not keep specific time records, that it is difficult to allocate the resources on these cases and stated that she will file a declaration regarding estimates of time spent on the case. Mr. Weinkauf and Mr. Malone presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to Claude's share being kept in a 7660 Summary Administration Account instead of being distributed to the Treasurer. The Amended first and Final Report and Account, etc. is continued to May 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for Terry Braly. Steven Weinkauf for Public Administrator.

Mr. Malone stated that he spoke with Mr. Davis (genealogist), and that Mr. Davis explained that they have made every effort to locate a Child but were unsuccessful, that he made contact with an old Boyfriend of the Decedent who says that the Decedent told him that she had a child in the mid 90's and that the child was given up for adoption, that they were unable to find a birth certificate, that if there was an adoption those records are sealed and that he feels they are at a dead end. Mr. Malone and Mr. Weinkauf indicated that they both feel that there are no further efforts they could take to locate a beneficiary. The Petition to Determine Heirship was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
